first_enabled.clinical_display_label: Vascular inflammation risk (homocysteine-linked)
first_enabled.subtitle: A pattern combining inflammation and homocysteine signals associated with vascular risk
first_enabled.why_it_matters: Accumulating vascular-risk signals warrant cardiometabolic review and lifestyle action.

first_enabled.clinical_display_label: Thyroid-linked lipid disturbance pattern
first_enabled.subtitle: A pattern where thyroid-axis signals are accompanied by lipid disturbance
first_enabled.why_it_matters: Thyroid axis changes can drive lipid disturbance and warrant joint review.
first_enabled.supporting_biomarkers_summary: Ldl Cholesterol, Non Hdl Cholesterol, Apob, Hdl Cholesterol

first_enabled.clinical_display_label: One-carbon pathway stress (homocysteine with macrocytic pattern)
first_enabled.subtitle: Homocysteine elevation with larger red-cell index suggesting one-carbon / marrow context
first_enabled.why_it_matters: This pattern links nutrient–cofactor networks to vascular and blood-cell maturation questions that deserve coherent follow-up, not a single-marker snapshot.

first_enabled.clinical_display_label: Residual LDL signal within a more favourable lipid transport picture
first_enabled.subtitle: LDL elevation alongside relatively stronger HDL signalling—particle architecture still matters
first_enabled.why_it_matters: Cumulative atherogenic exposure is read in full transport context; reassuring HDL does not erase residual LDL-related risk.
first_enabled.supporting_biomarkers_summary: Ldl Cholesterol, Non Hdl Cholesterol, Apob, Hdl Cholesterol
